records.m_Talk_ENG: Mavka, you stay here. I'll be back soon!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mavka, you stay here. I'll be back soon!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mavka, you stay here. I'll be back soon!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's a girl who struggled to take on a C.O. even going to do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's a girl who struggled to take on a C.O. even going to do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's a girl who struggled to take on a C.O. even going to do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe, nothing much if I'm by myself. But this is Ciringrad!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe, nothing much if I'm by myself. But this is Ciringrad!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe, nothing much if I'm by myself. But this is Ciringrad!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You shouldn't underestimate the people living here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You shouldn't underestimate the people living here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You shouldn't underestimate the people living here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: In fact, I'm a Counter, but I might end up with nothing to do...
records.m_Talk_DEU: In fact, I'm a Counter, but I might end up with nothing to do...
records.m_Talk_FRA: In fact, I'm a Counter, but I might end up with nothing to do...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, civilians here hunt C.O.s?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, civilians here hunt C.O.s?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, civilians here hunt C.O.s?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're not just civilians, they're the <color=#ffd34c>militia</color>. Some are even as strong as Counters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're not just civilians, they're the <color=#ffd34c>militia</color>. Some are even as strong as Counters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're not just civilians, they're the <color=#ffd34c>militia</color>. Some are even as strong as Counters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. Then I'll come with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. Then I'll come with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. Then I'll come with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Really?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Really?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Really?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lead the way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lead the way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lead the way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! Then let's go together!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! Then let's go together!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! Then let's go together!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's time to hunt some C.O.s!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's time to hunt some C.O.s!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's time to hunt some C.O.s!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's like we're going on a picnic...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's like we're going on a picnic...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's like we're going on a picnic...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's been quiet for a while, but where did they suddenly appear from?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's been quiet for a while, but where did they suddenly appear from?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's been quiet for a while, but where did they suddenly appear from?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is the Eternium barrier that Sasha fixed broken?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is the Eternium barrier that Sasha fixed broken?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is the Eternium barrier that Sasha fixed broken?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wouldn't be surprised since it has been exposed to the Corruption for so long.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wouldn't be surprised since it has been exposed to the Corruption for so long.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wouldn't be surprised since it has been exposed to the Corruption for so long.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right now, we need to worry about hunting those C.O.s and getting their Eternium.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right now, we need to worry about hunting those C.O.s and getting their Eternium.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right now, we need to worry about hunting those C.O.s and getting their Eternium.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And protecting the village.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And protecting the village.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And protecting the village.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, making sure you stay alive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, making sure you stay alive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, making sure you stay alive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Has the freezing weather gotten to your brain...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Has the freezing weather gotten to your brain...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Has the freezing weather gotten to your brain...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone! It's time to get to work!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone! It's time to get to work!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone! It's time to get to work!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! I was just about to get restless!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! I was just about to get restless!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! I was just about to get restless!

records.m_Talk_ENG: These C.O.s are faster than the ones we've dealt with before!
records.m_Talk_DEU: These C.O.s are faster than the ones we've dealt with before!
records.m_Talk_FRA: These C.O.s are faster than the ones we've dealt with before!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So look alive!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So look alive!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So look alive!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We know that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We know that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We know that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...! Wait...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...! Wait...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...! Wait...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh! Look out!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh! Look out!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh! Look out!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Phew... Right on time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phew... Right on time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phew... Right on time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sasha?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sasha?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sasha?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! Ciringrad's strongest Counter, Sasha, at your service!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! Ciringrad's strongest Counter, Sasha, at your service!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! Ciringrad's strongest Counter, Sasha, at your service!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fighting C.O.s isn't a game.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fighting C.O.s isn't a game.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fighting C.O.s isn't a game.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stand behind me. I'll take care of the C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stand behind me. I'll take care of the C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stand behind me. I'll take care of the C.O.s.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who's this girl? Is she Sasha's friend?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who's this girl? Is she Sasha's friend?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who's this girl? Is she Sasha's friend?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't just stand there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't just stand there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't just stand there!
